explanation: This command attempts to add the Exchange PowerShell snap-in, which is the core behavior detected by the Sigma rule. It uses a direct command line without obfuscation to simulate typical usage.

This command uses the alternative PowerShell executable (pwsh) and the short form of the -Command parameter (-c) to achieve the same behavior as the first command, testing for substitution and omission techniques.
This command uses single quotes around the snap-in name to test for insertion techniques while maintaining the same functionality.
This command uses escaped characters and spacing to test if the Sigma rule can detect the command despite syntactic variations.
This command adds the -NoProfile flag, which is optional but does not affect the core behavior of adding the snap-in. It tests for reordering and omission techniques.
